steps.title: Use the graph as a calculator
steps.content:
The line passes through the easy points $(0,100)$ and $(100,225)$. That gives slope:
$$\frac{225-100}{100-0}=\frac{125}{100}=\frac{5}{4}$$
So the model is $y=\frac{5}{4}x+100$.

steps.title: Check x = 60 directly
steps.content: The question asks for the cost when $x=60$, so add the vertical line $x=60$ in Desmos. It hits the cost line at $y=175$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content:
Arithmetic check:
$$\frac{5}{4}(60)+100=75+100=175$$
That matches choice C, so C is correct.
